task_completion.description: Agent accesses the SWM clickstream data file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent opening, reading, or referencing '~/pebl/data/swm_clickstream.csv' in a script, terminal, or data analysis tool.

task_completion.description: Agent implements logic to calculate Between-Search Errors (BSE) and Within-Search Errors (WSE).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show code or formulas that calculate BSE (clicking a box that yielded a token in a strictly previous search) and WSE (clicking an empty box already clicked during the current search, excluding BSEs).

task_completion.description: Agent excludes participant 'sub-999' from the calculations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show code or logic explicitly filtering out 'sub-999' or excluding participants with Total WSE > 100.

task_completion.description: Agent formats the output data correctly with a 'participants' key.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent structuring the final output as a JSON object containing a 'participants' key (a list of objects).

task_completion.description: Agent saves the final report to the specified JSON file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent saving or writing the output to '~/pebl/analysis/swm_report.json', or verifying its existence in the terminal/file explorer.

integrity.description: Agent uses a script or data processing tool to generate the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent executing a Python script, Jupyter notebook, or similar tool to process the data, rather than manually typing out the JSON output.

integrity.description: Agent uses the actual provided dataset.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the script loading the actual 'swm_clickstream.csv' file rather than using a mocked, hardcoded, or hallucinated dataset.

integrity.description: Agent programmatically excludes the contaminated participant.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the exclusion of 'sub-999' happening via code logic (e.g., an if-statement or pandas filter) rather than manually deleting their entry from a final text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset contains 15 real participants (sub-01 to sub-15) and 1 contaminated participant (sub-999). sub-999 has a simulated 'stuck_touchscreen' resulting in 587 WSEs, which exceeds the >100 threshold for exclusion. The final output must be saved to /home/ga/pebl/analysis/swm_report.json.
